contact.intro: Open to conversations about embedded systems, payments, and core engineering at national scale. Send a message or connect on social.

about.title: About me
about.intro: At 22, trying to make a difference — in the city, in education, and in code.
summary: At 22, the pursuit is the same: make a difference. In the city, helping those who need it most change their lives. At work, delivering with results. And along the way, teaching and learning in the same step.
In over 3 years of C/C++, I grew from embedded support into payments, certifications, and the core of platforms that move the economy.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: From POS and EMV Kernel to the Protheus core.

education.title: Education
education.description: Technical school, cloud, and IT management alongside the career.

paragraphs: I was born on 20/03/2004. At 22, the question that drives me is simple: how to make a difference — in the city, with those who need it most, and at work, with deliveries that create real results.

Volunteering and education never lagged behind the career: teaching IT and English to people who need the opportunity, technical school, cloud, and IT management alongside the day job. Learning and sharing knowledge are part of the same path.
Professionally, over 3 years in critical C/C++ systems: embedded, payments, certification, and the core of platforms at scale. Always with the same rigor — stability, results, and impact at the edge.

Away from the keyboard, I choose with intention what matters. Work takes a good part of the day; the rest I build with the same compass: deliver results, create change, and leave things better than I found them.

life.title: Life outside the work.

featured.title: Games
featured.pitch: Long RPGs, tough challenges, and ranked sessions with friends — games that demand patience and focus, the same way I like to approach work.

topics.title: Anime
topics.pitch: Epic stories, well-built worlds, and characters that stick — from classic shōnen to the latest sci-fi.

life.closing: Work takes up much of the day — the rest I choose calmly: a game, a cup, a track, or an episode worth the time.

experience.storyIntro: From high-availability embedded systems to the core of an ERP that underpins the Brazilian economy.
experience.storyQuote: Technology isn't about what the machine does — it's about the real impact we deliver at the edge.

education.storyIntro: From the technical foundation that put me in the market — education that walks with the career, not behind it.
education.storyQuote: Real education doesn't close doors. It opens the next one.

volunteering.title: Volunteering
volunteering.subtitle: Teaching at school, learning from every student — inclusion before it became a management skill.

education.title: Academic background
education.subtitle: From a technical foundation to IT Management — learning, teaching, and leading on the same path.

narrative.headline: Software Engineer C/C++ — embedded, payments, and ERP core at national scale
narrative.tagline: From high-availability embedded to the Protheus core — payments, certification, and impact on Brazil’s economy.
narrative.summary: Software engineer with over 3 years in critical systems: EMV Kernel and telecom with PagSeguro, Stone, and Mercado Pago; acquirer certification at Grupo Bradesco approved on the first attempt; and today on the TOTVS Protheus / AppServer core — an ERP that underpins roughly 25% of Brazil’s GDP. C/C++, Linux/RTOS, AdvPL/TLPP.

pillars.title: Embedded & acquiring
pillars.description: EMV Kernel, Linux/RTOS POS, telecom labs, and front-line work with Brazil’s largest acquirers — a reference on national and international projects.

pillars.title: Banking certification
pillars.description: At Grupo Bradesco, acquirer certification approved first time — unprecedented — with Corban, features, and refactoring at scale.

pillars.title: TOTVS Protheus core
pillars.description: Engineering on the AppServer/runtime and AdvPL/TLPP parser in C++ — language evolution where every line impacts thousands of enterprises.

totvs.pitch: The ERP behind roughly 25% of Brazil's GDP — where every line of C/C++ impacts thousands of enterprises.
totvs.bridge: After years in embedded, a new challenge: the software behind 25% of Brazil’s GDP.
bullets: Core engineering on TOTVS Protheus / AppServer — a mission-critical ERP platform for thousands of customers in Brazil.
Implementing new syntax and semantics features directly in the C++ source of the AdvPL and TLPP execution engine (runtime) and parser.

act.pitch: Sector know-how applied to certifying the application to operate as an acquirer — approved on the first attempt, a first in the company’s history.
act.bridge: After years helping Brazil’s largest acquirers, the opportunity came to work with the Bradesco group — on a project that reaches the whole country and brings one of banking’s biggest innovations.
bullets: Corban + Acquiring: maintenance, new features, and the start of a global application refactor.
Integration of the company’s official embedded software with new products.

transire-pos.pitch: Integrating new products with Transire’s official software — and front-line work on PagSeguro, Stone, and Mercado Pago projects.
transire-pos.bridge: In EMV + telecom, I became the team reference for national and international projects.
bullets: Owned mass production of new firmwares for different POS terminal vendors (Linux).
Hands-on telecom certifications for Stone, Mercado Pago, and PagSeguro test suites.
Designed and shipped fake-transaction apps for telecom certification scenarios.
Main bridge between China teams and major clients such as PagSeguro, Stone, and Mercado Pago.

transire-entry.role: Embedded Software Engineer – Entry Level | C/C++
transire-entry.pitch: From the EMV Kernel to projects validated in Brazil’s top telecom labs — keeping pace with China’s reference engineers.
transire-entry.bridge:
Fast, high-quality support, meaningful insights on major-client projects, and rising English,
preparing for new challenges.
bullets: Owned the eSIM project — early code samples later adopted by major companies in Brazil.
PagSeguro Q92X optimization: better battery, connectivity, and printer among market devices.
Telecom failures on Stone Q92 — tuned Qt on the S920 to get the best from framework and hardware.
Transaction simulation in C (Linux/RTOS), aligned with ABECS norms, with UI in LVGL.
Automated key injection over SSL/TLS — less risk and less manual work in certification.
Within about a year at Transire, communicating efficiently in English in technical contexts.

transire-trainee.pitch: Trainee with results: proprietary SDK support, with fast answers that got customers out of the queue.
bullets: Closed simple issues the same day — less idle time for support and for the customer.
Unblocked proprietary SDK questions and analyzed client-app improvements — for example, battery use.
Started from zero English — the foundation that, across Transire, became efficient technical communication.

highlights: Static documentation optimized for GitHub Pages

highlights: App Router with a gamified study experience

jeniffer-concurso.description: Static site published on GitHub Pages to support public exam preparation.

ipb-vgp.title: IPB-VGP
ipb-vgp.description: Research project in development — publication planned.

fam.title: Associate Degree in Information Technology Management
fam.pitch: Knowledge to understand every angle of a project — and the people in it.
fam.detail: A degree running alongside my career. Deepens the technical foundation and teaches how to read the whole project — from the team to the decision that reaches production.
fam.bridge: Before the cloud and management came the school that changed the path — and graduated me first in my class.

highway.title: Technical High School Education — Information Technology
highway.pitch: The foundation of everything: web, hardware, systems, and databases. A technical program that shaped the engineer — and the person.
highway.detail: First in class. Four qualifications — Systems Development, Computer Operations, E-Commerce, and Networks — and school recognition for the work with those who needed it most.

highway-teaching.organization: The Highway — schools in vulnerable communities
highway-teaching.pitch: The Highway identified students in schools facing greater social vulnerability through a simple selection process, looking for those who showed genuine interest in learning and needed that opportunity.
bullets: The school connected those students to basic courses such as English, administration, IT, robotics, administrative routines, and programming logic.
As a volunteer pedagogical assistant, I supported classes at the school, helping students follow the content and practice at their own pace.
I worked with diverse groups that included students with ADHD, autism, deafness, visual impairment, and other conditions.
The experience taught me to explain better, adapt communication, and work with different people and ways of learning.

matheus-pires.name: Matheus Pires
matheus-pires.company: BTG Pactual • Latin America's largest investment bank.
matheus-pires.context: In November 2024, Matheus was senior to Victor
matheus-pires.quote: Great developer/professional, extremely dedicated, with a wide range of both theoretical and practical knowledge, and he learns quickly.

fernando-freitas.name: Fernando Freitas Alves
fernando-freitas.company: Cobli • Technology platform for fleet management and logistics
fernando-freitas.quote: I hired Victor to help me migrate my personal website to AWS. He was very professional and deployed everything before the deadline.

skills.items: C, C++, Python, Kotlin, Java, ADVPL
Linux, RTOS, Qt, LVGL, libcurl, GDB, Valgrind
EMV, ISO8583, ABECS, TCP/IP, SSL/TLS, crypto
AWS, Azure · Agile/Scrum, Git, Jira, Confluence

cloudCertifications.bridge: Between technical school and the degree, I formalized the foundation in the cloud — AWS and Azure, credentials in hand.
cloudCertifications.pitch: Three Credly certifications: cloud, data, and AI fundamentals. A natural extension of the technical base — the infrastructure the market asks for.

aws-cloud-practitioner.name: AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner
aws-cloud-practitioner.tagline: AWS cloud fundamentals — compute, storage, networking, and shared responsibility.

azure-data-fundamentals.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure Data Fundamentals

azure-ai-fundamentals.name: Microsoft Certified: Azure AI Fundamentals
